task_completion.visual_evidence: PyMOL application is open and the 1VRT structure is visible in the viewer or listed in the right-hand object menu.

task_completion.description: Highlight the active site (catalytic triad) and the NVP ligand in the structure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PyMOL viewer shows the NVP ligand and the catalytic triad (Asp110, Asp185, Asp186) distinctly represented (e.g., as sticks, spheres, or colored differently from the rest of the protein).

task_completion.description: Measure the distance between the NVP ligand and the catalytic triad.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A distance measurement line (usually a dashed line with a numerical value in Angstroms) is visible in the PyMOL viewer connecting the NVP ligand to the catalytic triad.

task_completion.description: Save the figure of the heterodimer with highlighted features to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PyMOL command line shows a command saving the image to '~/PyMOL_Data/images/rt_allostery.png', or a file manager/terminal shows the file exists in that directory.

task_completion.description: Write a structural analysis report containing the required findings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displays the contents of '~/PyMOL_Data/rt_allostery_report.txt'. The text must include a distance value, chain IDs for p66 and p51, and at least 5 pocket residues.

integrity.description: The agent actually used PyMOL to view and analyze the structure.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the PyMOL GUI open with the structure loaded and manipulated, rather than just running a headless script.

integrity.description: The distance measurement in the report matches a measurement taken in PyMOL.
integrity.visual_evidence: The distance value written in the report should correspond to the visual measurement shown in the PyMOL viewer.

integrity.description: The report is written by the agent based on its analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen typing or echoing the report contents into the text file, rather than copying a pre-existing answer key.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The structure is PDB 1VRT. The ligand is NVP (nevirapine). The catalytic triad consists of Asp110, Asp185, and Asp186. The valid distance between the NVP ligand and the catalytic triad is between 8.0 and 15.0 Angstroms. Known NVP binding pocket residues include 100, 101, 103, 106, 108, 138, 179, 181, 188, 190, 227, 229, 234, and 318.
